name: Pesto Chicken & Pepper Wraps
recipeIngredient: 1 1/4 pounds chicken breast or thighs, boneless and skinless
2 red bell peppers, stemmed, seeded and halved
recipeInstructions:
NOTE: You can use homemade or store-bought pesto sauce. If using frozen pesto, thaw before using.
1. Combine 1/4 cup pesto, vinegar, salt, and black pepper in a medium bowl. Add chicken; toss to coat. Cover and refrigerate at least 30 minutes. Remove chicken from marinade; discard marinade.
2. Grill chicken over medium-hot briquets about 4 minutes per side until chicken is no longer pink in the center, turning once. Grill bell peppers, skin sides down, about 8 minutes until skin is charred. Place bell peppers in a large resealable plastic food storage bag; seal. Let stand 5 minutes; remove skin. Cut chicken and bell peppers into thin strips.
3. Spread about 1 tablespoon of remaining pesto down the center of each tortilla. Top with chicken, bell peppers, cheese, and lettuce. Roll tortillas to enclose filling. Garnish with orange slices, chiles, and basil sprigs. Makes 5 wraps. Each wrap: 481 calories; 40g fat.
